subject: Kikaonde
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Bañanyi bo walanguluka bengijisha bingi bizhima kutama mu kino kyalo kya Zambia?
topics: Mufunjishi abuule bafunda kwambapo bintu bimo byo bafunda mu kwipipisha. Apa bino, ne aye
